content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.epi.org/blog/raising-the-minimum-wage-could-improve-public-health/", "source_title": "Raising the minimum wage could improve public health", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "In a paper published by the University of Chicago Press, David Meltzer and Zhou Chen analyzed the relationship between obesity rates and the...", "direct_quote": "In a paper published by the University of Chicago Press, David Meltzer and Zhou Chen analyzed the relationship between obesity rates and the minimum wage, using data from the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) from 1984-2006.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The BRFSS interviews more than 350,000 adults each year, making it the largest health survey in the world.", "direct_quote": "The BRFSS interviews more than 350,000 adults each year, making it the largest health survey in the world.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "They find that gradual erosion in the inflation-adjusted value of minimum wages across states explains about 10 percent of the increase in a...", "direct_quote": "They find that gradual erosion in the inflation-adjusted value of minimum wages across states explains about 10 percent of the increase in average body mass since 1970.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
